# MixZoo

MixZoo is a vibrant and eclectic animal-themed brand featuring a wild and diverse cast of creatures — including a dog, fish, bear, monkey, bat, shark, cat, and wolf. The brand has a playful, adventurous personality with a mix of domestic and wild animals creating a unique and memorable identity. The company is led by CEO Michael Buell and has a dedicated MixZoo team, suggesting an organized business with a strong brand culture built around animal diversity and fun.

Source: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app

---

## Dive Into a Wild World of Pets &amp; Animals — MixZoo

URL: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app
Description: Explore MixZoo&#39;s vibrant animal kingdom where dogs, bats, and coral reef fish collide. Meet our wild cast and unleash adventure with every click—join the fun today!

Dive Into a Wild World of Pets & Animals — MixZoo

# Welcome to the Wild & Wonderful World of MixZoo


### Meet our eclectic cast of creatures — from playful pups to curious bats — and discover a unique animal adventure for families, schools, and pet lovers alike.


Meet the Animal Cast
Plan Your Visit





















## Discover the Wild & Wonderful World of MixZoo


From friendly domestic companions to majestic forest adventurers and mysterious night-time flyers, MixZoo brings together a diverse cast of creatures in one playful, educational universe. Meet the animals that make our brand unforgettable.












Friendly Companions




### Loyal Paws & Purrs


Dogs, cats, and the pets that feel like family. These cuddly characters bring warmth, loyalty, and a whole lot of tail-wagging fun to the MixZoo crew.










Underwater Explorers




### Deep Blue Discoveries


Dive into the deep with our shark fish, colorful coral reef fish, and the tiny otocinclus catfish. These aquatic adventurers prove that life under the sea is full of surprises.










Forest Adventurers




### Wild Woods Wanderers


Bears, monkeys, and the curious creatures of the canopy. These forest friends bring a sense of adventure, teaching us about the magic of the great outdoors.










Night-Time Flyers




### Moonlight Mysteries


When the sun sets, the bats and wolves come out to play. Discover the fascinating world of different types of bats and the loyal pack spirit of the wolf under the stars.

























## Why Families & School Groups Love MixZoo


We bring the wild, wonderful world of animals directly to your community with an educational, hands-on experience that sparks curiosity in every child. From fascinating types of bats to vibrant coral reef fish, our diverse animal cast creates unforgettable memories.


















Animal Cast


### Unforgettable Animal Diversity


From the loyal dog to the mysterious bat, our eclectic MixZoo crew features eight unique species. Kids get to meet a shark fish, a playful monkey, and even a wolf, learning about habitats and behaviors in a safe, engaging environment.









Educational


### School-Friendly Storytelling


Our programs are designed with educators in mind. We weave curriculum-aligned lessons into every visit, covering biology, conservation, and the unique traits of creatures like the otocinclus catfish and coral reef fish. It's learning disguised as pure fun.





















Team


### Approachable Team-Led Experiences


Led by CEO Michael Buell, the dedicated MixZoo team brings passion and expertise to every interaction. We pride ourselves on creating a warm, welcoming atmosphere where every child feels comfortable asking questions and exploring the animal kingdom up close.

















## Loved by Families, Teachers & Animal Fans


Hear what our community of pet enthusiasts, school groups, and wildlife lovers say about their MixZoo adventures.











"MixZoo is pure magic! My kids can't stop talking about the amazing animals they met — from the playful otters to the mysterious types of bats in the nocturnal zone. It's the best family day out we've had all year."





Sarah Mitchell
Parent of Two
















"As a teacher, MixZoo is my go-to field trip destination. The educational value is outstanding — the team weaves in real biology and conservation lessons while keeping the kids laughing. Learning about coral reef fish and their ecosystems was a highlight for my class."





Mr. James Rodriguez
3rd Grade Teacher













"I've been an animal lover my whole life, and MixZoo blew me away. The diversity of creatures is incredible — I never thought I'd get so close to a real shark fish or an otocinclus catfish in such a beautifully designed space. CEO Michael Buell and the MixZoo team have built something truly special."





Alex Chen
Wildlife Enthusiast























## Come Meet the MixZoo Crew!


Whether you’re planning a family outing, a school group adventure, or just want to learn more about our wild and wonderful team — we’d love to hear from you. Reach out and let’s create something unforgettable together.



Get in Touch



About MixZoo














Where curious creatures and happy humans meet — MixZoo brings animal adventures to life with playful experiences, educational shows, and a whole lot of heart.

## Meet Our Crazy Crew from Bats to Sharks — MixZoo

URL: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/animal-cast
Description: Discover the MixZoo animal cast: from mysterious types of bats to dazzling coral reef fish and fierce shark fish. Which creature will steal your heart? Dive in now!

Meet Our Crazy Crew from Bats to Sharks — MixZoo






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Animal Cast
- About MixZoo
- Contact



Contact















# Meet the MixZoo Cast


Every creature brings a spark of personality to our wild, wonderful crew. From loyal paws to curious fins, each animal adds a unique note to the MixZoo adventure — a place where domestic charm meets untamed spirit.












Fan Favorites

### Dog & Cat


The heart of the MixZoo home. Our loyal dog brings boundless energy and comforting warmth, while the curious cat adds a touch of independent charm and quiet mischief. Together they remind us that the best adventures start at home.












Aquatic

### Fish & Shark


Dive into the deep end with our dazzling coral reef fish and the ever-majestic shark. They glide through the MixZoo waters with grace and a hint of mystery, showing us that every ecosystem has its gentle giants and tiny treasures.









Woodland

### Bear & Monkey


From the forest canopy to the berry-filled clearings, our bear and monkey duo bring laughter and strength. The bear’s gentle wisdom pairs perfectly with the monkey’s acrobatic antics, making every woodland tale unforgettable.









Nocturnal

### Bat & Wolf


When the sun sets, our night crew takes the stage. The bat navigates the twilight skies with astonishing precision — a reminder of the many fascinating types of bats — while the wolf’s loyal howl echoes across the moonlit hills, calling the pack together.





















Led by CEO Michael Buell and the passionate MixZoo team, every animal adventure is crafted with care, creativity, and a deep love for creatures great and small.











## Meet the MixZoo Crew


Every creature has a story — from the deep sea to the starry skies. Get to know the wild and wonderful personalities that make our world so special.
















### Bailey the Bold


Loyal leader with a heart of gold and a tail that never stops wagging.











### Finn the Explorer


Curious reef dweller who knows every hidden cove and loves discovering new coral gardens.











### Bramble the Wise


Forest guardian who shares stories of the old woods and the best berry patches.











### Miko the Mischief


Acrobatic prankster who turns every day into an adventure high in the treetops.











### Echo the Nightwing


Silent flyer who navigates the dusk skies and knows every type of bat in the colony.











### Neptune the Navigator


Ocean wanderer who glides through deep currents and protects the underwater realm.











### Luna the Enigma


Graceful and mysterious companion who walks between shadows and sunbeams with equal poise.











### Shadow the Songkeeper


Pack storyteller whose howl carries ancient songs across the frozen wilderness.













## Discover How Our Animal Cast Inspires Curiosity & Learning


At MixZoo, every creature has a story to tell. From the depths of the ocean to the treetops of the forest, our diverse cast helps families explore the natural world through playful educational storytelling. Discover the unique habitats, behaviors, and personalities that make each animal a teacher in disguise.









### Explore Diverse Habitats


From coral reef fish to the dark caves where types of bats dwell, learn how each environment shapes the animals that call it home.










### Behavior & Unique Traits


Compare the playful pounce of a cat with the loyal pack mentality of a wolf. Our cast makes behavioral science easy and fun for young minds.










### Domestic vs. Wild Comparisons


Understand the bridge between our beloved pets and their wild cousins. See how a dog's loyalty mirrors the social bonds of wild wolves.














Forest Canopy



Coral Reef



Dark Cave



Domestic Home






🐒

🐟

🐕

## A Wildly Diverse Cast of Creatures


From the deepest coral reef fish to the most mysterious types of bats, our animal family brings together an extraordinary range of companions. Every creature has a story, and together they create the vibrant, adventurous spirit of MixZoo.

## Uncover the Story Behind Our Animal Frenzy — MixZoo

URL: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/about
Description: Led by CEO Michael Buell, MixZoo blends domestic charm with wild spirit. Learn how our team brings bats, wolf lore, and reef life into one roaring brand adventure.

Uncover the Story Behind Our Animal Frenzy — MixZoo






























Skip to main content















- Home
- Animal Cast
- About MixZoo
- Contact



Contact














01


## A Wildly Different Kind of Story


At MixZoo, we believe that animal entertainment should be more than just a spectacle—it should be a warm, welcoming adventure for everyone. From the loyal dog to the soaring bat, the curious monkey to the mysterious shark, our eclectic cast of creatures brings together the best of the wild and the wonderful.






02


## Rooted in Community, Led by Passion


Founded by CEO Michael Buell, MixZoo was built on a simple idea: create a space where families, school groups, and pet lovers can connect with animals in a way that feels personal and memorable. Our dedicated MixZoo team works every day to transform curiosity into connection, whether you're fascinated by coral reef fish or captivated by the silent flight of different types of bats.






03


## Our Mission: Make Every Visit Unforgettable


We're on a mission to make animal entertainment approachable, educational, and bursting with personality. Through playful storytelling, cozy environments, and a deep respect for every creature—from the tiny otocinclus catfish to the mighty wolf—MixZoo creates moments that stay with you long after you leave.








































## Meet Our Founder & CEO,Michael Buell




Michael Buell leads MixZoo with a vision that blends wild imagination with thoughtful care. His passion for animals — from loyal dogs and curious cats to fascinating creatures like bats and coral reef fish — sparked the idea of a brand where every creature has a story to tell. Michael believes that learning about animals should feel like an adventure, not a lecture.


Under his leadership, MixZoo has grown into a vibrant community hub where families, school groups, and pet lovers discover the joy of the animal kingdom. His approach is grounded in three core values that shape everything we do.












### Creature-First Care


Every animal, whether a playful monkey or a sleek shark fish, deserves respect, enrichment, and a voice.










### Community Adventure


We build experiences that bring people together — from exploring types of bats to discovering otocinclus catfish habitats.










### Organized Playfulness


Behind the wild fun is a dedicated MixZoo team ensuring every visit is safe, educational, and unforgettable.














Founder & CEO


Michael Buell












## Meet the MixZoo Crew


Behind every roar, chirp, and splash is a passionate team dedicated to bringing animal adventures to life. Led by CEO Michael Buell, the MixZoo team combines creative storytelling, thoughtful organization, and genuine warmth to craft unforgettable experiences for families, school groups, and curious explorers. We believe that learning about creatures — from coral reef fish to types of bats — should feel like joining a friendly, slightly wild club where everyone belongs.






The heart of MixZoo — teamwork makes the dream work.








### Animal Storytelling


We craft the tales that make every creature — from otocinclus catfish to mighty bears — a character you'll never forget.








### Guest Engagement


Our experience hosts turn every visit into a personal encounter, sparking curiosity about shark fish, wolves, and beyond.








### Education Support


We design programs that meet curriculum needs, making MixZoo a favorite destination for school groups and lifelong learners.








### Creative Operations


The behind-the-scenes magic that keeps our crew — dogs, monkeys, bats, and all — happy, healthy, and ready to perform.











## Our Core Values


These are the guiding principles that shape every experience at MixZoo — from our animal family to our community.








### Curiosity


We believe that every creature, from the smallest otocinclus catfish to the largest shark fish, has a story worth discovering. Our programs spark wonder and encourage lifelong learning about the animal kingdom.







### Kindness


Compassion is at the heart of MixZoo. We treat every animal — whether a playful dog, a curious bat, or a majestic wolf — with the respect and gentle care they deserve, creating a safe haven for all.







### Adventure


From the depths of coral reef fish habitats to the mysterious world of different types of bats, we bring the thrill of exploration to every visit. Adventure is our compass, guiding us to create unforgettable encounters.







### Community


MixZoo is more than a collection of animals — it's a family. Led by CEO Michael Buell and our passionate MixZoo team, we build connections between people and wildlife, fostering a sense of belonging for every visitor.













Where curious creatures and happy humans meet — MixZoo brings animal adventures to life with playful experiences, educational shows, and a whole lot of heart.

URL: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/contact
Description: Got a question about otocinclus catfish care or our shark fish stars? Contact MixZoo now and let our animal-loving crew bring your wildest ideas to life—reach out today!

Roar Into Action & Reach the MixZoo Team — MixZoo

# Let's Talk Animals!


Got a question about our creature crew, want to plan a school visit, or just love chatting about pets and wildlife? The MixZoo team is all ears — reach out and let's make something wild happen together.













### General Inquiries


Have a general question, feedback, or just want to say hi? We'd love to hear from you. Drop us a line and the MixZoo crew will get back to you with a friendly reply.











### School & Group Visits


Planning a field trip, birthday party, or educational program? Our team can help you arrange an unforgettable experience with our diverse animal ambassadors.















## Send a Message to the MixZoo Team


We'd love to hear from you! Whether you're planning a school visit, a family day out, or just want to say hello to our wild crew, drop us a line.




Your Name




Email Address




Phone Number




Your Message

Send Message








## Get in Touch with the Wild Side


The MixZoo team, led by CEO Michael Buell, is passionate about creating unforgettable animal experiences. We're here to help you plan your adventure.



- ### Warm & Welcoming Response We reply with the same friendly energy you'd expect from our animal crew — helpful, kind, and enthusiastic.


- ### Family-Friendly Communication All our information is clear, accessible, and safe for young explorers. No confusing jargon — just pure fun.


- ### School & Group Support We have dedicated resources for educators and group leaders. Let us help you organize a memorable educational trip.


















## Planning Your MixZoo Adventure


Whether you're a family looking for a wild day out, a teacher planning an educational trip, or just curious about our eclectic animal crew — here's how to connect with us.












### Family & Group Visits


Perfect for curious kids and parents! Learn about our diverse MixZoo crew — from playful dogs to mysterious bats. We tailor experiences for all ages.

Get in Touch  →








### School & Educational Trips


Bring the classroom to life! Our interactive programs cover habitats, animal behavior, and even the fascinating types of bats. Custom worksheets and guided tours available.

Plan a Visit  →








### General Inquiries


Questions about our CEO Michael Buell, the MixZoo team, or just want to know more about our bear, shark, or otocinclus catfish? We'd love to hear from you!

Contact MixZoo  →










## Frequently Asked Questions


Everything you need to know about the MixZoo experience, our animal cast, and how to connect with CEO Michael Buell and the team.





### Who is MixZoo for?


MixZoo is built for families, school groups, and community organizations looking for a unique animal entertainment experience. Whether you love dogs, cats, or are fascinated by creatures like bats and sharks, our diverse cast of domestic and wild animal characters creates a welcoming adventure for all ages.




### What kinds of groups can contact the team?


We work with educational groups, birthday parties, corporate events, and community festivals. Our animal ambassadors — from playful monkeys to majestic wolves — are trained to deliver engaging, safe, and memorable presentations tailored to your group's interests.




### How are the animal characters presented?


Each character is introduced with a storybook-style narrative that highlights their personality and natural habitat. From coral reef fish to the mysterious types of bats, every animal is celebrated through educational storytelling that sparks curiosity and respect for wildlife.




### How can I reach Michael Buell or the MixZoo team?


The best way to connect with CEO Michael Buell and the dedicated MixZoo team is through our main contact page. Simply fill out the contact form with your inquiry, and we'll get back to you promptly to discuss bookings, partnerships, or any questions you may have.













Where curious creatures and happy humans meet — MixZoo brings animal adventures to life with playful experiences, educational shows, and a whole lot of heart.

## Privacy Policy

URL: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/privacy
Description: Our privacy policy - how we collect, use, and protect your information

Privacy Policy































- Home
- Animal Cast
- About MixZoo
- Contact



Contact








# Privacy Policy



Last Updated:  6/28/2026



MixZoo ("Company", "we", "our") is committed to protecting your privacy. This privacy policy explains how we collect, use and protect your information when you use our website [business_website] ("Service").


## 1. Information Collection


We may collect the following types of information:


- Personal Information: Name, email address, phone number and address

- Technical Information: IP address, browser type, operating system and website usage data

- Cookies: Information stored on your computer to improve user experience




## 2. Use of Information


We use the collected information for the following purposes:


- Providing requested services

- Improving service and user experience

- Contacting you regarding our services

- Compliance with legal requirements




## 3. Information Sharing


We do not sell, rent or share your personal information with third parties, except in the following cases:


- With your explicit consent

- When required by law

- To protect our rights or user safety

- With service providers who assist in operating the service (under confidentiality agreements)




## 4. User Rights


In accordance with Israeli Privacy Protection Law 1981, you have the following rights:


- Right to access personal information stored about you

- Right to correct inaccurate or incomplete information

- Right to delete personal information in certain circumstances

- Right to object to information processing for marketing purposes

- Right to file a complaint with the Data Protection Authority




## 5. Cookies


Our website uses cookies to improve user experience. You can manage cookies through your browser settings. Disabling cookies may affect website functionality.


## 6. Information Security


We implement reasonable security measures to protect your information, including encryption, firewalls and restricted access control. However, no transmission or storage method is 100% secure.


## 7. Policy Changes


We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be posted on the website with 30 days advance notice.



## 8. Contact Information


For questions or requests regarding this privacy policy, please contact us:


- Company: MixZoo

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]



Data Protection Authority: For complaints, you may contact the Data Protection Authority at the Ministry of Justice

## Accessibility Statement

URL: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/accessibility
Description: Our accessibility statement - our commitment to digital accessibility

Accessibility Statement































- Home
- Animal Cast
- About MixZoo
- Contact



Contact








# Accessibility Statement



Last updated:  June 28, 2026



MixZoo is committed to making our services accessible to all users. We strive to implement the Israeli Standard (TI 5568) based on WCAG 2.1 Level AA guidelines.


Accessibility Level: AA (Israeli Standard TI 5568)



## 1. Accessibility Policy


We believe in equal rights and the right of every person to receive information and services independently and equally. This website was designed and built with special emphasis on accessibility for people with disabilities.


## 2. Accessibility Arrangements on the Site


- Keyboard navigation support

- Screen reader compatibility

- Appropriate color contrast

- Flexible and scalable font sizes

- Descriptive image alt text

- Hierarchical heading structure

- Clear and descriptive links

- Support for 200% zoom without content loss





### WCAG 2.1 Compliance


The website complies with WCAG 2.1 Level AA, which includes:


- Perceivable: Information is presented in ways users can perceive

- Operable: Interface components are operable

- Understandable: Information and user interface are understandable

- Robust: Content can be interpreted by a variety of technologies





## 3. Supported Assistive Technologies


- NVDA (Windows)

- JAWS (Windows)

- VoiceOver (Mac/iOS)

- TalkBack (Android)

- Dragon NaturallySpeaking

- Switch navigation




## 4. Accessibility Testing


The website has been tested using:


- Automated accessibility testing tools

- Manual testing with screen readers

- Keyboard-only navigation

- Color contrast verification

- Testing with users with disabilities




## 5. Continuous Improvements


We are continuously working to improve the accessibility of our website and update it according to technological developments and user feedback.



## 6. Contact and Feedback


If you encounter an accessibility issue on the site or need assistance, please contact us:


- Company: MixZoo

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]



Response time: We respond to accessibility inquiries within 3 business days and work to resolve issues within 10 business days.

## Terms & Conditions

URL: https://mixzoo-a29a3b2a.zappy5.app/terms
Description: Terms of service - user rights and obligations

Terms & Conditions































- Home
- Animal Cast
- About MixZoo
- Contact



Contact








# Terms of Use



Last updated:  June 28, 2026



Use of this site constitutes agreement to the terms outlined below. Please read carefully before use.



## 1. Definitions


- "Company" - MixZoo

- "User" - Anyone who browses or uses the site

- "Services" - Pet & Animal Entertainment provided through the site




## 2. Description of Services


MixZoo provides Pet & Animal Entertainment through the site. The services are subject to the terms detailed in this document and may change from time to time.


## 3. Terms of Use


Use of the site is conditional on compliance with the following terms:


- Use of the site for lawful purposes only

- No interference with site operations or other users

- No uploading of offensive, illegal, or harmful content

- Respect for copyright and intellectual property rights

- No actions that may compromise site security




## 4. User Obligations


- Providing accurate and truthful information during registration or ordering

- Maintaining confidentiality of account access details

- Immediate notification of any unauthorized account use

- Updating personal information as needed




## 5. Payment and Refund Policy


If services include payment:


- Payments are processed through secure and encrypted systems

- Prices include applicable taxes as required by law

- Right to cancel will be in accordance with consumer protection laws

- Refunds will be processed within 14 business days of cancellation approval




## 6. Limitation of Liability


Services are provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. The Company will not be liable for indirect, consequential, or special damages arising from use of the site, except where required by law.


## 7. Copyright and Intellectual Property


All content on the site, including text, images, design, and code, is protected by copyright owned by MixZoo. Reproduction, distribution, or commercial use of content is prohibited without written permission.


## 8. Privacy


Collection and use of personal information is subject to our Privacy Policy. Use of the site constitutes agreement to the Privacy Policy as detailed separately.


## 9. Changes to Terms of Use


The Company may change these terms of use at any time. Material changes will be posted on the site with 30 days advance notice. Continued use after changes constitutes agreement to the new terms.


## 10. Service Termination


The Company may suspend or limit service at any time, including in cases of terms of use violations. In case of service termination, relevant provisions will remain in effect.


## 11. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution


These terms of use are governed by applicable laws. Any disputes will be resolved in accordance with local jurisdiction, with preference given to arbitration or mediation where possible.


## 12. General Provisions


- If any portion of the terms is found invalid, remaining terms will remain in effect

- Non-enforcement of a right will not be considered a waiver

- These terms of use constitute the entire agreement between the parties





## 13. Contact Information


For questions or clarifications regarding the terms of use:


- Company: MixZoo

- Email: [business_email]

- Phone: [business_phone]

- Address: [business_address]

# Thank You


Your message has been received.





Reference Number


---





We have received your message and our team will get back to you as soon as possible. A confirmation email has also been sent to your inbox.



While you wait, we invite you to explore our exhibits. Learn about fascinating types of bats in our nocturnal cave, discover vibrant coral reef fish and majestic shark fish in the grand aquarium, or see the helpful otocinclus catfish maintaining our freshwater habitats.
